chunks.text: Technical Reports - Robert W. Brodersen. Time Domain Interference Cancellation for Cognitive Radios and Future Wireless Systems (EECS-2010-61) by Jing Yang and Robert W. Brodersen. Cognitive Radios: System Design Perspective (EECS-2007-156) by Danijela Branislav Cabric and Robert W. Brodersen. BORPH: An Operating System for FPGA-Based Reconfigurable Computers (EECS-2007-92) by Hayden Kwok-Hay So and Robert W. Brodersen.

DC Power Supply Design in Portable Systems (M95/4) by Anthony J. Stratakos, Charles R. Sullivan, Seth R. Sanders and Robert W. Brodersen. MOS Switched-Capacitor Filters (M78/70) by R.W. Brodersen, P.R. Gray and D.A. Hodges. MOS Switched Capacitor Ladder Filters (M78/49) by D.J. Allstot, R.W. Brodersen and P.R. Gray.
